title: About Dot Marker Books
text: Dot Marker Books makes screen-free dot marker activity books for toddlers and preschoolers ages 1-5. The books use big, easy-to-fill dot patterns designed for little hands, are 50-60 pages each, and are rated 4.7 stars with over 7,246 orders shipped. There are 3 books in the collection so far, sold on Amazon and Etsy.

title: Book: Dot Markers - Animals (Ocean Animals Series, Vol. 1)
text: Dot Markers - Animals is part of the Ocean Animals Series, rated 4.6 stars from 11 reviews. It features sharks, fish, octopus and other ocean animals with big dot patterns toddlers can fill confidently on the first try. It has 50+ pages, is recommended for ages 2+, comes in paperback, and is sold on Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/Dot-Markers-Activity-Book-Animals/dp/B0F2NCZMH3.

title: Book: Dot Markers - Animals Vol. 2 (Jungle Animals Series)
text: Dot Markers - Animals Vol. 2 is part of the Jungle Animals Series, rated 4.7 stars from 92 reviews. It features sloths, lions, monkeys and more jungle animals as the sequel to the original Animals book. It has 50+ pages, is recommended for ages 2+, comes in paperback, and is sold on Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/Dot-Markers-Activity-Book-Animals/dp/B0GS98FJ4S and on Etsy at https://www.etsy.com/listing/4530506313/animal-dot-marker-activity-book-50.

title: Book: Dot Markers - ABC (ABC Learning Series)
text: Dot Markers - ABC is part of the ABC Learning Series and is the newest release. It teaches the alphabet A to Z through dot painting, with every letter getting its own bold, colorful page. It has 60+ pages, is recommended for ages 1-5, comes in paperback, and is sold on Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0H7RPKQWG.

title: Full Collection / Bundle & Bulk Orders
text: All 3 books together make a gift set with weeks of screen-free entertainment, ideal for birthdays or holidays. For bulk orders of 10+ copies (e.g. for a classroom or daycare), customers should reach out via the contact form for pricing and shipping options.

title: Customer Reviews
text: Dot Marker Books has 5-star reviews from 92+ families on Amazon. Parents highlight that the books build fine motor skills, help with animal and letter recognition, and are loved by toddlers as young as 20 months. Reviewers describe the designs as simple, fun, and a great activity for toddlers.

title: Free Sample Pages
text: Visitors can get 3 free dot marker pages (one favorite page from each book: Ocean, Jungle & ABC) as an instant printable PDF by entering their email in the free sample form on the website. This lets families try dot painting before buying. It's an instant PDF, requires no special printer, and they can unsubscribe any time.

title: About the Author - Veronica Daves
text: Veronica Daves is a passionate early childhood educator and creator of playful learning tools for toddlers and preschoolers. She focuses on hands-on, screen-free activities and designs books that spark creativity while building real developmental skills. Her Dot Marker Learning Library series brings joy, focus, and growth to kids ages 1-5.

title: FAQ: What markers work with these books?
text: Any standard dot marker (dauber) brand works great, such as Do-a-Dot or Bingo daubers. The thick paper handles multiple fills without bleed-through.

title: FAQ: What age range are these books for?
text: The Animals series is perfect from age 2 and up. The ABC book is designed for ages 1-5, making it ideal for building early letter recognition through art.

title: FAQ: Can I order in bulk for a classroom or daycare?
text: Yes. Teachers and therapists love these books. For bulk orders of 10+ copies, customers should reach out via the contact form for pricing and shipping options.

title: FAQ: Are these books good for kids with special needs?
text: Yes. The oversized dots and simple format are widely used by occupational therapists to build fine motor skills, focus, and color recognition in a low-pressure, joyful way.

title: FAQ: How many pages are in each book?
text: The Animals books have 50+ activity pages each. The ABC book has 60+ pages, one spread per letter plus bonus pages. All books are printed on quality paper stock.

title: FAQ: Are more books coming?
text: Yes, new themes are in the works. Signing up for the free sample pack is the best way to be first to know when new books launch.

title: Contact
text: For bulk orders, classroom sets, media and partnership inquiries, or general questions, customers can use the contact form on the website (name, email, and message fields).
